title: hieracium villosum subsp. chloropsis
intro: Hieracium villosum subsp. chloropsis, also known as the woolly hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Its medicinal properties include its ability to be used as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation, which makes it useful in treating urinary tract issues and joint pain. The health benefits of Hieracium villosum subsp. chloropsis include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
